title: Migrate API gateway to new routing schema
description: v2 routing schema breaks all existing consumers. Phoenix, Horizon, and Forge all depend on current gateway routes. Requires coordinated migration. NO decision log written yet.

title: Launch real-time data pipeline v2
description: New event-driven pipeline replacing batch ETL. Will change data shape for Horizon's notification feed.

title: Deprecate v1 token validation endpoint
description: After Phoenix ships PKCE, v1 endpoint can be deprecated. 90-day sunset period required. Phoenix is primary consumer.

title: Update token-validation schema for Postgres-backed tokens
description: When Phoenix migrates session storage to Postgres, the token payload structure changes. Atlas validation service must be updated simultaneously. Cross-team coordination required — no joint plan exists yet.
